frontier_summary: The local and imported API names are real and checked by RequiredDeclarations/ProductSuccessDeclarations, but every relevant W987/W1007/W988/W989 declaration remains a projection, repack, or delegation from an explicit provider argument. The existing mathlib anchors (ShortComplex.Exact, DerivedCategory, HasDerivedCategory, Abelian.Ext) and local YonedaExt/BoundedDerivedInfinityCategory APIs are useful background, but no inspected declaration constructs the missing positive OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess witness or eliminates the W987/W1007 provider input.

candidate_declarations.name: LeanLCAExactChallenge.Dbounded.BoundaryRelationTargetClosedEmbeddingClosednessNormalizedSourceEndpointLocalizedUnitFullDataProviderW987
candidate_declarations.why_relevant: This is the one-input W987 provider surface that W1449 ultimately still depends on; it packages W730 boundary/relation data plus W986 target/closedness/normalized-source/endpoint-localized data.

candidate_declarations.name: LeanLCAExactChallenge.Dbounded.BoundaryRelationTargetClosedEmbeddingClosednessNormalizedSourceEndpointLocalizedUnitBranchFullDataProviderW1007
candidate_declarations.why_relevant: This is the W1007 branch-full-data wrapper over W987 used by W1448/W1449; it confirms W1007 is still a provider wrapper, not a positive construction.

candidate_declarations.name: LeanLCAExactChallenge.Dbounded.componentFieldsOfBranchFullDataW1007
candidate_declarations.why_relevant: Provides the component fields consumed by W1449, but only by delegating through a W1007 provider argument.

candidate_declarations.name: LeanLCAExactChallenge.Dbounded.endpointStrictExactOfBranchFullDataW1007
candidate_declarations.why_relevant: Provides endpoint strict exactness for W1449, but it is inherited from W1006/W987 provider data.

candidate_declarations.name: LeanLCAExactChallenge.Dbounded.unitMappingConeAlgebraicExactOfBranchFullDataW1007
candidate_declarations.why_relevant: Provides unit mapping-cone algebraic exactness for W1449, but still consumes the W1007 provider.

candidate_declarations.name: LeanLCAExactChallenge.Dbounded.unitMappingConeStrictExactOfBranchFullDataW1007
candidate_declarations.why_relevant: Provides unit mapping-cone strict exactness for W1449, but still consumes the W1007 provider.

candidate_declarations.name: LeanLCAExactChallenge.Dbounded.directBoundedLeftCalculusOfBranchFullDataW1007
candidate_declarations.why_relevant: Gives the direct bounded left-calculus proof used by W1449, but only after accepting a W1007 provider.

candidate_declarations.name: LeanLCAExactChallenge.Dbounded.boundedDerivedInfinityCategoryOfBranchFullDataW1007
candidate_declarations.why_relevant: Gives the bounded-derived infinity-category object used by W1449, but remains provider-derived.

candidate_declarations.name: LeanLCAExactChallenge.Dbounded.w1007RewrappedBoundedDerivedInfinityCategoryW1449
candidate_declarations.why_relevant: Confirms W1449's stable object is merely W1007 data on the rewrapped W1447 provider.

candidate_declarations.name: LeanLCAExactChallenge.Dbounded.w1449W987RewrappedStableRouteInputCount
candidate_declarations.why_relevant: Source-backed proof that the W1449 route still has one W987/W1007 input.

candidate_declarations.name: LeanLCAExactChallenge.YonedaExt
candidate_declarations.why_relevant: Local positive-degree Yoneda Ext infrastructure exists and is checked, but it is not connected in inspected sources to constructing the missing W987/W1007 positive witness.

candidate_declarations.name: LeanLCAExactChallenge.Dbounded.BoundedDerivedInfinityCategory
candidate_declarations.why_relevant: Local bounded-derived infinity-category certificate target exists, but current W987/W1007 route obtains it through provider data.

candidate_declarations.name: Mathlib.Algebra.Homology.ShortComplex.Exact.ShortComplex.Exact
candidate_declarations.why_relevant: Imported exactness API is checked and may be useful for future primitive constructions, but no source-backed route from it to the W987 positive witness was found.

candidate_declarations.name: Mathlib.Algebra.Homology.DerivedCategory.Basic.DerivedCategory
candidate_declarations.why_relevant: Imported derived-category API is checked, but inspected local route still uses local provider-derived bounded-derived data.

candidate_declarations.name: Mathlib.Algebra.Homology.DerivedCategory.Ext.Basic.Abelian.Ext
candidate_declarations.why_relevant: Imported Ext API is checked, but no source evidence shows it can replace the W987/W1007 provider surface.

unsupported_names.name: OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess
unsupported_names.reason: No inspected local declaration provides a positive witness replacing provider packaging; audit evidence instead checks originalFourTaskContractCompletion_productSuccessClaimed=false.

unsupported_names.name: constructW987ProviderFromMathlibExactness
unsupported_names.reason: No local or imported declaration with this role was found; W987 is a structure requiring W730 and W986 fields.

unsupported_names.name: constructW1007ProviderFromYonedaExt
unsupported_names.reason: YonedaExt exists, but no inspected declaration connects it to W1007 provider construction or positive product success.

hallucination_rejects.name: ShortComplex.Exact.toStrictShortExact
hallucination_rejects.reason: Not observed in the audited source/log surfaces; local strict exactness is handled by MetrizableLCA.strictShortExact and provider-derived declarations.

hallucination_rejects.name: Abelian.Ext.yonedaProduct_positiveWitness
hallucination_rejects.reason: Not observed; local YonedaExt product APIs exist, but no positive-witness product-success bridge was found.

hallucination_rejects.name: DerivedCategory.boundedInfinityCategory
hallucination_rejects.reason: Not observed; local BoundedDerivedInfinityCategory and Dbounded.infinityCategory are the checked names.

minimal_lean_snippets.description: Parent can rerun this read-only #check scout to confirm the provider frontier and imported anchors.
minimal_lean_snippets.code:
import LeanLCAExactChallenge.MathlibSurvey
import LeanLCAExactChallenge.Derived.ClosedMapBoundaryRelationTargetSurjectiveCompactClosedEmbeddingClosednessNormalizedSourceEndpointLocalizedUnitFullDataClosedMapBranchFullDataW987RewrappedStableRouteGuardW1449

#check LeanLCAExactChallenge.Dbounded.BoundaryRelationTargetClosedEmbeddingClosednessNormalizedSourceEndpointLocalizedUnitFullDataProviderW987
#check LeanLCAExactChallenge.Dbounded.BoundaryRelationTargetClosedEmbeddingClosednessNormalizedSourceEndpointLocalizedUnitBranchFullDataProviderW1007
#check LeanLCAExactChallenge.Dbounded.w1007RewrappedBoundedDerivedInfinityCategoryW1449
#check LeanLCAExactChallenge.Dbounded.w1449W987RewrappedStableRouteInputCount
#check LeanLCAExactChallenge.YonedaExt
#check ShortComplex.Exact
#check DerivedCategory
#check Abelian.Ext

candidate_next_action: Reject W987/W1007 provider-packaging as the next implementation route. If parent wants one Lean confirmation, add a tiny audit file with the minimal snippet above and rerun only that file; otherwise direct implementation/search toward constructing W730 plus W986 from primitive positive data or toward an explicit positive OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess witness, not another W1007/W987 rewrap.

rejected_routes.reason: Recorded in Issues/proof_search_cache.tsv as rejected_provider_packaging_nonterminal; source evidence shows packaging through W989/W988 back to W987 without positive product success.
Recorded in Issues/proof_search_cache.tsv as rejected_explicit_cycle; W1448 wraps W1447 data as W1007 and proves the W987 repack is identity on that rewrapped provider.
W1449 exposes useful exactness/stable outputs but proves w1449W987RewrappedStableRouteInputCount, leaving one provider input and productSuccessClaimed=false.

failure_signature: No source-backed declaration was found that constructs BoundaryRelationTargetClosedEmbeddingClosednessNormalizedSourceEndpointLocalizedUnitFullDataProviderW987 or BoundaryRelationTargetClosedEmbeddingClosednessNormalizedSourceEndpointLocalizedUnitBranchFullDataProviderW1007 from mathlib exactness/Yoneda/derived APIs without assuming provider data; current checked route remains one-input provider-derived and productSuccessClaimed=false.
implementation_note: Read-only local API scout only. The target repo was not edited and no Lean build was run. One broad rg over run logs produced excessive output; subsequent evidence was gathered with targeted rg/sed inspections.
